text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day—the day when everyone
exchanges special treats.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mostly out of curiosity, I go to check out the
event area at the department store's food hall.
However...

Do your best, Trainer! Don't think twice, just keep
pressing forward!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, what a coincidence. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! We're on a date! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm being dragged around. She made me go to
this cafe with hideous decorations... and this stall
that sold nothing but fluorescent stuff.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Not my fault that the city's filled with so
many grammable spots on Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Today, I'm taking Ayabe to all my favorites! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I know what you're thinking. Don't get the wrong
idea.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's not why I'm here.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I... um... I want to say sorry... for what happened
before the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I was completely wrong. I shouldn't have taken my
frustration out on you like that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm really sorry.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... hic... That really... Sniffle... That really scared me, you know!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's like... It's like you were saying you didn't even
care if you died!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I really am. I don't feel like that
anymore... And I would never say anything like
that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well I don't forgive you! You have no idea how worried I was.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You don't have to forgive me. It's your
right not to.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I won't forgive you—not now.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You have to make it up to me first. Don't give me
an apology. Give me your company. Lots and
looots of it!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's the only reason I'm here. It's what I have to
do to apologize...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, don't say thaaat. You're supposed to be
having fun.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm going to show you loooads of places
and stuff that you've never seen before!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You might even find something you didn't know
you like.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Isn't that what's important for you now, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The silence after Curren Chan's statement
reminds me of a previous discussion Admire Vega
and I had.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Everything not related to running... I had to ignore everything I ever wanted.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I lived my whole life looking away, ignoring it
all...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And now, I have no idea what to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's in the process of picking up the pieces of
herself she had abandoned. She's trying to live
her life to the fullest, just like we talked about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finding something she likes is probably what she
should be doing right now.
choice_data_list: Show her a good time, Curren!
Show her a good time, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha! You got it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All right, let's hit the next spot!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Hold on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that evening...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We're bumping into each other a lot today...
choice_data_list: We sure are. Headed back to the academy?
We sure are. Headed back to the academy?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No. Curren and I already went back to our dorm.
And... I decided to go out again.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wanted to see the stars.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been all that often... ever since she went
away and we stopped being able to talk.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But being dragged around by Curren today...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It made me feel like going out again.
choice_data_list: Guess that's one thing you certainly like.
Guess that's one thing you certainly like.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Right...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I see. Yeah... I like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I smile at her softly as she affirms herself. Then, I
notice there's a vending machine nearby and
decide to buy her something for her stargazing
trip.
choice_data_list: Would you like a hot drink to take with you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mention that I'm buying one for myself too, so
it's no inconvenience to me. I wait a second for
her to respond...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oolong tea... please. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me an answer far more readily than I
had expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her stroll off with an ever-so-slight
bounce in her step. I wonder if I should spend the
night by my window looking up at the stars
myself.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll have an oolong tea then...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...No. Actually, what are you having?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give it a little thought and recall the event I
visited earlier this afternoon.
choice_data_list:
I'm going to get a hot cocoa. It's Valentine's
Day, after all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's a weird reason.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll have the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After receiving the can of hot cocoa, Admire
Vega jogs off toward the hill.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It's really sugary...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What a weird way to make a decision.
